question: What pressure ratings are defined in API 6A?

chunks.content: API S PECIFICATION 6A/ISO 10423 425 Table 83 — Maximum hanger outside diameter for wellheads .........................................................
chunks.document: API Spec 6A Wellhead & Xmas Tree Equipment 20th Edition Errata At 2016.pdf

response_preview:
**Answer:** The pressure ratings defined in API 6A include "13,8 MPa; 20,7 MPa; 34,5 MPa; 69,0 MPa; 103,5 MPa and 138,0 MPa" [1][1].
